Package io.github.projectunified.hytalerun.maven

package io.github.projectunified.hytalerun.maven
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ArtifactCopier
    Copies the project artifact and its dependencies into the mods directory.
    AssetsResolver
    Resolves the Hytale assets path.
    ForkedServerRunner
    Runs the Hytale server as a forked child process.
    RunServerMojo
    Runs a Hytale server with the project's plugin artifacts loaded.
    ServerCommandBuilder
    Builds the server CLI arguments shared by both forked and in-process runners.
    ServerJarResolver
    Resolves the Hytale server JAR location.
